# Survival and Time-to-Event Analysis {#sec-survival}

```{r setup}
#| include: false
#| eval: true
source(here::here("R/functions.R"))
source(here::here("R/load-packages.R"))
```

## Introduction

This session covers survival analysis concepts such as Kaplan-Meier
estimation and time-to-event modeling, with an emphasis on reproducible
research practices.

## Learning outcomes

- Describe survival and censored data.
- Fit Kaplan-Meier curves using R.
- Interpret survival summaries in clinical research.
